description: CompositionWhite T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with graphic print and nike swoosh on the front and nike tag on the left sleeveFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis T-shirt from Nike is designed for all your sporting needs. The soft cottons fabric keeps you fresh even on the hottest of days which is sure to give you exemplary comfort and become your favourite running tee. Pair it with shorts and sports shoes
